flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Brazosport College rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 (41.0% → 56.2%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Brazosport College are 19% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($45.9k vs $38.7k).
